title: Serve custom LLMs with Custom Model Serving (Beta)
body: You can now serve custom and fine-tuned LLMs on Databricks with a vLLM engine, including multimodal models and PEFT recipes that Foundation Model APIs does not support. Custom LLM Serving is in Beta. See [Serve custom LLMs with Custom Model Serving](/aws/en/machine-learning/model-serving/serve-custom-llms).

ref_links.text: Serve custom LLMs with Custom Model Serving
